title: Luscious Spicy German Sausage Bake
description: A spicy, creamy, gluten-friendly German solo-dinner dish featuring phyllo dough, clay-pot-cooked to perfection.
instructions: In a large clay pot or oven-safe dish, layer 4-6 sheets of phyllo dough, brushing each sheet with melted butter.
Arrange the sliced onion on top of the phyllo dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Add the minced garlic, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper on top of the onion.
Place the Spicy German sausages on top of the onion-garlic mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix the Greek yogurt and cheddar cheese until well combined.
Pour the yogurt-cheese mixture over the sausages.
Repeat the phyllo dough layering process, brushing each sheet with melted butter, and finishing with a layer of phyllo on top.
Cover the pot with a lid or aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the lid or foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
